Package com.rays.dto

Class StudentDTO

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDTO
      • com.rays.dto.StudentDTO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DropdownList
    @Entity
public class StudentDTO
extends BaseDTO
    StudentDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the Student entity. This class extends BaseDTO and represents a student in the system.

    This DTO stores student details including enrollment number, name, date of birth, contact information, and associated college details. It implements the required methods for unique key identification using enrollment number and provides full name for dropdown display.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      • getUniqueKey

        public java.lang.String getUniqueKey()
        Gets the unique key attribute name for this DTO. The enrollment number serves as the unique key for students.
        Specified by:
        getUniqueKey in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "enrolNo" as the unique key attribute

      • getUniqueValue

        public java.lang.String getUniqueValue()
        Gets the value of the unique key attribute for this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getUniqueValue in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        the enrollment number as the unique value

      • getLabel

        public java.lang.String getLabel()
        Gets the display label for this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getLabel in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "Enroll No" as the display label

      • getTableName

        public java.lang.String getTableName()
        Gets the table name associated with this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getTableName in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "Student" as the table name

      • getValue

        public java.lang.String getValue()
        Gets the value for dropdown display. Returns the full name (first name + last name) of the student.
        Returns:
        the full name of the student
